# LLM Resayil — AI API Platform

> OpenAI-compatible LLM API with 45+ AI models. Pay per token. Local GPU inference + cloud proxies. KNET payments.

## What is LLM Resayil?
LLM Resayil is a pay-per-token AI API platform providing access to 45+ large language models via a fully OpenAI-compatible REST API. Developers can switch to LLM Resayil by simply changing their base URL to https://llm.resayil.io/api/v1.

## Models Available
- Local models (1 credit/token): Llama 3.2 3B, Llama 3.1 8B, Qwen 2.5 7B, GLM-4 7B, DeepSeek 7B, and more
- Cloud proxy models (2 credits/token): DeepSeek V3.1 671B, Qwen 3.5 397B, Llama 3.3 70B, and 27 more

## Pricing
- 5,000 credits: 2 KWD
- 15,000 credits: 5 KWD
- 50,000 credits: 15 KWD
- Payment: KNET (Kuwait debit/credit) via MyFatoorah

## API Compatibility
Fully compatible with OpenAI's Chat Completions API. Works with any OpenAI SDK — Python, JavaScript, Go, etc.

## Documentation
Full API docs: https://llm.resayil.io/docs

## Contact
https://llm.resayil.io/contact
